name: Korea Shipbuilding & Offshore Engineering Co., Ltd.
summary: Korea Shipbuilding & Offshore Engineering Co.,Ltd. engages in shipbuilding and offshore engineering businesses in South Korea. The company builds oil tankers, containerships, bulk carriers, lng and lpg carriers, pc tankers, semi-submersible drilling rigs, special-purpose ships, floating/fixed-type oil and gas production facilities, subsea pipelines and offshore installations, power plants, chemical processing plants, processing equipment, and special equipment. It also provides two-stroke and four-stroke marine engines, and components; propellers; engine power plants; and photovoltaic modules and systems. The company was formerly known as Hyundai Heavy Industries Co., Ltd. The company was founded in 1972 and is based in Seoul, South Korea.
